'''âm-r-y''' ('''maraya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuckpoint|tuckpoint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuckpoint|tuckpoint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-r-y
|-
! Lemma
| maraya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:marayithi|marayithi]] || [[word:marayiji|marayiji]] || [[word:marayishi|marayishi]] || [[word:marayi|marayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:marayuthuth|marayuthuth]] || [[word:marayujuj|marayujuj]] || [[word:marayushush|marayushush]] || [[word:maray|maray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:marayuthu|marayuthu]] || [[word:marayuju|marayuju]] || [[word:marayushu|marayushu]] || [[word:marayu|marayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:marayufuth|marayufuth]] || [[word:marayufuj|marayufuj]] || [[word:marayufush|marayufush]] || [[word:marayuf|marayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:marayethe|marayethe]] || [[word:marayeje|marayeje]] || [[word:marayeshe|marayeshe]] || [[word:maraye|maraye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:marayothoth|marayothoth]] || [[word:marayojoj|marayojoj]] || [[word:marayoshosh|marayoshosh]] || [[word:maray|maray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:marayotho|marayotho]] || [[word:marayojo|marayojo]] || [[word:marayosho|marayosho]] || [[word:marayo|marayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:marayofoth|marayofoth]] || [[word:marayofoj|marayofoj]] || [[word:marayofosh|marayofosh]] || [[word:marayof|marayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:marayĂŠthĂŠ|marayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:marayĂŠjĂŠ|marayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:marayĂŠshĂŠ|marayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:marayĂŠ|marayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:marayathath|marayathath]] || [[word:marayajaj|marayajaj]] || [[word:marayashash|marayashash]] || [[word:maray|maray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:marayatha|marayatha]] || [[word:marayaja|marayaja]] || [[word:marayasha|marayasha]] || [[word:maraya|maraya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:marayafath|marayafath]] || [[word:marayafaj|marayafaj]] || [[word:marayafash|marayafash]] || [[word:marayaf|marayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:marayasha|marayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomarayasha|gomarayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimarayasha|gokimarayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:maraynĂŒsha|maraynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomaraynknĂŒsha|gomaraynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimaraynĂŒsha|gokimaraynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:marayshĂ«sha|marayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomaraynkshĂ«sha|gomaraynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimarayshĂ«sha|gokimarayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:marayrosha|marayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomaraynkrosha|gomaraynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimarayrosha|gokimarayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:maraymusha|maraymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomaraynkmusha|gomaraynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimaraymusha|gokimaraymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:maraysherasha|maraysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomaraynksherasha|gomaraynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimaraysherasha|gokimaraysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:marayngasha|marayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomaraynkngasha|gomaraynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimarayngasha|gokimarayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:marayasha|marayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomaraynkyasha|gomaraynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimarayasha|gokimarayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:marayamasha|marayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomaraynkyamasha|gomaraynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimarayamasha|gokimarayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:maraynĂŒshĂ«sha|maraynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomaraynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomaraynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimaraynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimaraynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:maraynĂŒrosha|maraynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomaraynknĂŒrosha|gomaraynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimaraynĂŒrosha|gokimaraynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maraynĂŒmusha|maraynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomaraynknĂŒmusha|gomaraynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimaraynĂŒmusha|gokimaraynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:marayshĂ«nĂŒsha|marayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomaraynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomaraynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimarayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimarayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:marayshĂ«rosha|marayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomaraynkshĂ«rosha|gomaraynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimarayshĂ«rosha|gokimarayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:marayshĂ«musha|marayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomaraynkshĂ«musha|gomaraynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimarayshĂ«musha|gokimarayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:marayronĂŒsha|marayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomaraynkronĂŒsha|gomaraynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimarayronĂŒsha|gokimarayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:marayroshĂ«sha|marayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomaraynkroshĂ«sha|gomaraynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimarayroshĂ«sha|gokimarayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:marayromusha|marayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomaraynkromusha|gomaraynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimarayromusha|gokimarayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:maraymunĂŒsha|maraymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomaraynkmunĂŒsha|gomaraynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimaraymunĂŒsha|gokimaraymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:maraymushĂ«sha|maraymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomaraynkmushĂ«sha|gomaraynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimaraymushĂ«sha|gokimaraymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:maraymurosha|maraymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomaraynkmurosha|gomaraynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimaraymurosha|gokimaraymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:maray|maray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠrĂŠy|mĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homaray|homaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠrĂŠy|homĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomaray|hohomaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠrĂŠy|hohomĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmaray|nĂŒmaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠrĂŠy|nĂŒmĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmaray|nĂŒnĂŒmaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠrĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmaray|nĂŻmaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠrĂŠy|nĂŻmĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmaray|nĂŻnĂŻmaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠrĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumaray|lumaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠrĂŠy|lumĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumaray|lulumaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠrĂŠy|lulumĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limaray|limaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠrĂŠy|limĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimaray|lilimaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠrĂŠy|lilimĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komaray|komaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠrĂŠy|komĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomaray|kokomaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠrĂŠy|kokomĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemaray|kemaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠrĂŠy|kemĂŠrĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemaray|kekemaray]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠrĂŠy|kekemĂŠrĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
